Celebrity Beyond • July 19–26, 2026

Matthew’s
Birthday Cruise

A week of ocean views, island adventures, beautiful dinners and time together — planned with love by Anuujin.

See our trip ↓
How to use: Tap any day to open or close it. The outfit images are saved inside this file, so it works offline on the ship — save it to your phone's Files/Books before boarding. Pinterest links need internet.
Jump to day:12345678Pack
Our week at a glance

Miami to the Caribbean

Eight days aboard Celebrity Beyond with Puerto Plata, Tortola, St. Kitts and Nevis, sea days, specialty dining and an extra-special birthday in the middle.

Reservation #300107 · Stateroom 12105 (Deluxe Inside, Deck 12) · Muster station A4 · Main dining 8:30 p.m. · Terminal A, Port Miami

Puerto PlataDamajagua Waterfall Adventure
Birthday in TortolaIsland adventure + Le Voyage
St. Kitts + NevisCatamaran, beach, lunch and cocktails

Miami Embarkation

Sailaway at 4:00 p.m.

Coastal Cream + Black
Day before
Answer the health questions in the Celebrity app (reminder arrives today)

Matthew’s packing guide

What to bring

Black or midnight-navy suit
Dress shirt, tie and formal shoes
White and cream linen shirts
Olive, navy and pale-blue resort shirts
Three pairs of swim trunks
Secure water shoes
Comfortable sneakers and slides
Sunglasses, hat and sunscreen
Quick-dry waterfall outfit
One polished black farewell look

One birthday. Three islands. A whole week together.

Happy early birthday, Matthew. ❤️
